# strava-run-coach

> Stdlib-only Python running coach: Strava history in (bulk-export CSV, REST
> sync, or Strava MCP JSON) -> Daniels VDOT race prediction, CTL/ATL/TSB
> fitness tracking, periodized plan generation with .ics export, plan
> reconciliation, long-horizon trends, and a self-contained HTML dashboard.
> `coach.py` is the single entry point; no pip installs, ever.

Key facts: all athlete numbers live in `config.json` (falls back to
`config.example.json`); `enrichment.is_real_run()` is the single filter for
"is this a real run"; Strava MCP list summaries carry no heart rate — merge
`get_activity_performance` payloads via `--performance`; never commit
anything under `data/`.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): quickstart, command table, Use-with-Claude setup
- [Methodology](docs/METHODOLOGY.md): the named, cited models (VDOT, TSS,
  CTL/ATL/TSB, two-stream load, ACWR caveats, goal-probability heuristic)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): module map + data interface contract
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): working notes for AI agents (commands, hard rules)
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): tests, stdlib-only rule, style

## Agent surface

- [strava-coach-analyze skill](.claude/skills/strava-coach-analyze/SKILL.md):
  MCP pagination + ingestion recipe
- [weekly-review skill](.claude/skills/weekly-review/SKILL.md)
- [race-forecast skill](.claude/skills/race-forecast/SKILL.md)
- [build-plan skill](.claude/skills/build-plan/SKILL.md)
- [Plugin manifest](.claude-plugin/plugin.json): install via
  `/plugin marketplace add abrarhaque-code/Strava-Run-Coach`
- [MCP config](.mcp.json): official Strava MCP at https://mcp.strava.com/mcp

## Code entry points

- [coach.py](coach.py): CLI router (full/brief/forecast/fitness/trends/week/
  scenario/plan/analyze/reconcile/dashboard/init)
- [config.example.json](config.example.json): every tunable, with the Yves
  Klein Blue dashboard theme tokens
- [mcp_adapter.py](mcp_adapter.py): Strava MCP JSON -> cache (+ performance
  merge, CSV rebuild)
